title: cynorkis calanthoides
intro: Cynorkis calanthoides, also known as the Yellow Slipper Orchid, is a species of flowering orchid native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cynorkis calanthoides include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cynorkis calanthoides is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
